title: Competitive benchmarking against Magma/Sage/AFF3CT
description: Conduct rigorous performance benchmarking of gf2 against established systems: Magma and Sage for binary field operations and polynomial arithmetic, AFF3CT and IT++ for FEC decoder performance. Document methodology, publish results, and identify optimization targets. Goal: within 2x of Magma/Sage, exceed on SIMD operations.
